gpu_backend.gpu_device: NVIDIA RTX PRO 6000 Blackwell Workstation Edition
NVIDIA RTX PRO 6000 Blackwell Workstation Edition

sector_implications.message: Shor factoring demonstrated on 3/3 demo numbers. Sector healthcare uses RSA — vulnerable to CRQC Shor attack. RSA-2048 requires ~4098 logical qubits (achievable by ~2031).

research_basis.roetteler_2017: Quantum resource estimates for ECC discrete log

sector_implications.message: ECC discrete log demonstrated on GF(2^4). Sector healthcare uses ECDSA-256 — vulnerable to quantum ECDLP. P-256 requires ~2330 qubits.
Grover search demonstrated on small spaces. AES-128 effective security drops to 64 bits under Grover. AES-256 remains secure (128-bit effective). Recommendation: Migrate to AES-256.

summary.practical_status_2026: Regev offers asymptotically better gate complexity but requires sqrt(n) independent quantum runs and O(n log n) qubits. As of 2026, Shor remains the practical standard for CRQC threat modeling.

references.regev_2023: Regev, O. "An Efficient Quantum Factoring Algorithm"

grover_under_noise.noise_description: IBM Heron r1 (ibm_torino, 133 qubits) — fallback specs

assessment.description: Some degradation — attack still viable with more shots
assessment.implication: In healthcare sector (ibm_ibm_torino noise): quantum attack fidelity = 85.3%. Attack effective even with noise.

qft_under_noise.noise_description: IBM Heron r1 (ibm_torino, 133 qubits) — fallback specs

assessment.description: Noise impact minimal — quantum attack remains highly effective
assessment.implication: In healthcare sector (ibm_ibm_torino noise): quantum attack fidelity = 93.1%. Attack effective even with noise.

attack_sequence: 4. Shor circuit breaks RSA/ECC (demo: N=15 factored in real circuit)
5. Plaintext recovered (data valid for 50 more years)
hndl_simulation.recommendation: Sector healthcare: HNDL window = 45 years. IMMEDIATE migration to PQC required.

risk_factors: ECC vulnerable to discrete log attack
sector_risk_assessment.recommendation: Sector healthcare overall quantum risk: CRITICAL. Key risks: RSA vulnerable to Shor; ECC vulnerable to discrete log attack; HNDL window: 45 years. Immediate PQC migration recommended.
